summary: Advanced Filters & Sorting feature fully tested. All 40 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all filter components on Leads, Projects, and PreSales pages. localStorage persistence confirmed working.
passed_tests: 1. Leads Page - Time filter works (All Time, This Month, Last Month, This Quarter, Custom Range) - PASSED
2. Leads Page - Designer filter shows and filters by designer - PASSED
3. Leads Page - Sorting works (Created Date, Updated Date, Budget) - PASSED
4. Leads Page - Filters persist after page reload (localStorage) - PASSED
5. Leads Page - Clear filters button works - PASSED
6. Projects Page - Time filter works - PASSED
7. Projects Page - Designer filter works - PASSED
8. Projects Page - Hold Status filter works (All, Active, On Hold, Deactivated) - PASSED
9. Projects Page - Sorting works (Created Date, Updated Date, Project Value) - PASSED
10. PreSales Page - Time filter works - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API endpoints correctly implement time_filter, designer_id, hold_status, sort_by, sort_order parameters
Frontend AdvancedFilters.jsx is a well-designed reusable component with proper localStorage integration
Filter persistence works correctly via saveFiltersToStorage/loadFiltersFromStorage utility functions
Designer filter correctly shows only for Admin/SalesManager/DesignManager roles
Hold Status filter is Projects-specific as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing leads, projects, and presales data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Filters feature is complete and working. All three pages (Leads, Projects, PreSales) have time filters, sorting, and localStorage persistence. Projects page has additional Hold Status filter. Designer filter shows for manager roles. localStorage keys: arkiflo_leads_filters, arkiflo_projects_filters, arkiflo_presales_filters.
